case_title: XIFENG HUANG VS. QUN R. HUANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF XIFENG HUANG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER CONNIE CHEN. DEFENDANT QUN R. HUANG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. DEFENDANT PEI Q. HUANG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. DEFENDANT'S WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, XIFENG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HUANG, QUN R. HUANG, PEI Q. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY HUANG, XIFENG AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, QUN R. HUANG, PEI Q. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
